CREATE TABLE example_table (id INT, value STRING);
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION external_filter(val STRING, pat STRING) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."rexpr_like";
CREATE OR REPLACE FILTER FUNCTION schema_a.re_like(val STRING, pat STRING) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."rexpr_like";
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION case_sensitive_filter(val STRING) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."case_sensitive_func";
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION multi_arg_filter(val1 STRING, val2 INT, val3 BOOL) RETURNS FLOAT EXTERNAL NAME algebra."multi_arg_func";
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION validate_email(email STRING) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."email_validator";
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION custom_like(val STRING, pattern STRING) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."custom_regex_like";
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION complex_filter(val STRING, threshold INT) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."complex_func";
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION check_positive(val INT) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."check_positive_func";
CREATE OR REPLACE FILTER FUNCTION detailed_filter(val STRING, criteria STRING) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."detailed_filter_func";
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION user_defined_filter(val STRING) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."user_filter_func";
CREATE TABLE second_table (id INT, detail STRING);
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION join_filter(val1 STRING, val2 STRING) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."join_condition_func";
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION regex_match(input STRING, pattern STRING) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."regex_match_func";
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION order_filter(order_id INT, user_id INT) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."order_filter_func";
CREATE TABLE filter_test (id INT, data STRING);
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION test_filter(input STRING) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."test_filter_func";
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION nested_filter(input STRING) RETURNS BOOL EXTERNAL NAME algebra."nested_func";
CREATE OR REPLACE FILTER FUNCTION pass_through_filter(val STRING) RETURNS STRING EXTERNAL NAME algebra."pass_through";
